summary: Generates low-frequency oscillator waveforms (sine, square, triangle, ramp, pulse) as CHOP channels. Commonly used for cyclic animation and parameter modulation.

key_params.name: type
key_params.note: Waveform shape: Sin, Gaussian, Triangle, Ramp, Square, Pulse

key_params.name: offset
key_params.note: Vertical offset added to the waveform

common_gotchas: Default output range is -1 to 1 for sine; use a Math CHOP to remap to 0-1 if needed for parameters.
LFO is time-dependent — if the timeline is paused, the LFO will also pause unless set to independent time.
